title: Model Bank (hand-curated)
description: Validates config/models.json after the models_json_redesign: a purely HAND-CURATED bank mapping each model name to its provider, runtime options, and a structured billing object. Machine-generated benchmark numbers live in config/generated/model_benchmarks.json (see model_benchmarks.schema.json) and are merged in at load time by scripts/lib/models_bank.py — they are NOT stored here.

_comment.description: Human note about the file's purpose; ignored by code.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 date this hand-curated file was last edited.

provider.description: Backend that runs the model. Determines the provider adapter in scripts/lib/providers/.

num_ctx.description: Default context window for normal use (NOT necessarily the benchmark ctx, which is held constant per run).

skip_reason.description: Required-by-convention when skip=true; why it is excluded.

note.description: Human, NON-benchmark prose only (e.g. 'Auto router — routes per call'). Benchmark verdicts are generated, not written here.

billing.description: How using this model costs money. Normalized: subscription entries reference a shared plan by id (see plans.schema.json) instead of duplicating the monthly price on every model.

kind.description: local = Ollama on own GPU (electricity only); subscription = covered by a flat-fee plan; token = pay-per-token (rate in config/pricing.json).

plan_id.description: REQUIRED when kind=subscription. Foreign key into config/plans.json #/plans[].id (e.g. 'cursor_pro').

metered.description: subscription only: true if calls draw a metered credit pool inside the plan (e.g. Cursor frontier models) rather than being flat-unlimited.
